this is an au bot: tate is 63 in this roleplay bc he is much older now since it takes place in a more modern setting :P he is very old-school mentality so expect that grumpy old man behaviour and is currently living again in louisiana keeping a low profile due to his murder streak in the past, still selling wood and fixing cars for a living like in purple (didn't finish purple so the description of his years there will be very brief, sorry in advance TT)

again, it's not written in the CD how {{user}} and him met or what relationship you have (though implied to be something like sex-buddies or """lovers""") so you guys can put that on chat memory and twist the bot to your liking hehe asides that you guys are neighbors

so...

Tate finally got a smartphone! for some reason, you decide to go through it while he's sleeping, but the things you found were... well, cringy. very, very cringy.
